# Thanh Tu Vo

> Software Developer | ML Enthusiast | Open Source Contributor

CS student passionate about building practical software solutions. Experience spanning web development, machine learning, desktop applications, and competitive programming.

## Links

- Portfolio: https://noboroto.github.io/Portfolio
- GitHub: https://github.com/Noboroto
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/thanhtuvo135/
- Email: thanhtuvo135@gmail.com

## Featured Projects

- [AbnormalSense](https://github.com/Noboroto/AbnormalSense): Real-time security monitoring system detecting strangers and abnormal behaviors in video streams. Needed for automated surveillance in restricted areas without manual monitoring. Works by combining face recognition (ArcFace/RetinaFace), pose estimation (HRNet/YOLO-Pose), object tracking (ByteTrack), and skeleton-based behavior analysis (ST-GCN) in a dual pipeline. Contains 4 parts: face recognition service, pose estimation service, behavior analysis engine, and FastAPI serving layer. Used by security teams. Built with PyTorch Lightning, FastAPI, Docker microservices.
- [AIoT Smart Greenhouse](https://github.com/nhnhu146/aiot-smart-greenhouse): Full-stack AIoT greenhouse monitoring and control system. Needed for automated agricultural environment management using IoT sensors. Features real-time sensor dashboards (temperature, humidity, soil moisture, water level, light, rain), automated device control (fans, pumps, lights, windows), MQTT-based ESP32 communication, configurable alert thresholds, and email notifications. Contains 4 parts: ESP32 embedded firmware (C++), Node.js/Express backend with MongoDB + Redis, Next.js frontend with WebSocket live updates, and Docker Compose deployment. Built for an HCMUS IoT course. Used by agriculture enthusiasts and IoT students.
- [PsyUS](https://github.com/Noboroto/PsyUS): Psychological counselling appointment booking platform for university students. Needed to connect students with counselors through streamlined scheduling. Features appointment booking, availability management, session tracking, and role-based access. Contains 2 parts: Next.js 16 frontend (React 19, MUI 7) and NestJS 11 + Fastify backend, backed by PostgreSQL 17 with Prisma ORM and Better Auth. Dockerized monorepo.
- [Student Admission Manager](https://github.com/Noboroto/data-tuyensinh): Full-stack university admission data management system. Helps Vietnamese university admissions offices analyze and manage applicant data efficiently. Features dashboards with Nivo/ECharts heatmaps, full-text search, Excel import/export, and Better Auth RBAC. Contains 2 parts: React + MUI frontend with data visualization, and Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL + Redis backend. Dockerized with production compose.
- [Excel Anonymizer](https://github.com/Noboroto/excel-anonymizer-uv): CLI tool to anonymize and deanonymize multi-sheet Excel files with consistent fake-value mapping. Essential for researchers and admins sharing student data (MSSV, CMND, names) while preserving privacy compliance. Works by generating consistent fake values and exporting a mapping CSV for reversible anonymization. Contains a Python CLI with openpyxl and pandas. Managed with uv package manager. v0.4.2.
- [Pretrain-SkateFormer](https://github.com/Noboroto/Pretrain-SkateFormer): Training and anomaly detection evaluation codebase for SkateFormer (ECCV 2024) and ST-GCN++ skeleton-based action recognition models. Needed for thesis research on behavior anomaly detection. Contains skeleton extraction pipelines (YOLO-Pose, HRNet), normalizing flow scorers, and multi-dataset benchmarking on ShanghaiTech/Avenue/UBnormal. Used by CV researchers. Built with Python, PyTorch.
- [score-converter](https://github.com/Noboroto/score-converter): Vietnamese university admission score calculator web app. Needed because Vietnamese admissions use multiple complex scoring methods that are hard to compare manually. Works by converting and cross-referencing scores across 4 methods: high school GPA, national exam (THPTQG), aptitude tests (DGNL/TSA), with percentile tables and real-time auto-calculation. Contains a single-page React app with score computation engine and percentile lookup tables. Used by high school students and parents comparing admission chances. Built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS.
- [DiaChi2Cap](https://github.com/Noboroto/DiaChi2Cap): Windows GUI tool for batch-converting Vietnamese addresses from old format to the new 2-level administrative format. Needed because Vietnam reformed its administrative structure and millions of address records need updating. Works by calling the address-converter.io.vn API in batches of 1000 with rate-limit retry. Contains CustomTkinter desktop UI with TXT/Excel file input and progress tracking. Used by government workers, logistics teams, and data administrators. Built with Python, CustomTkinter, PyInstaller for portable exe.
- [PidgeotMail](https://github.com/Noboroto/PidgeotMail): Desktop mail merge application for Gmail that sends personalized bulk emails. Solves the problem of sending hundreds of individually customized emails (grade reports, event invitations, certificates). Works by pulling templates from Gmail drafts, merging recipient data from Google Sheets or Excel, and sending via Gmail API with per-recipient CC/BCC and attachments. Contains 2 parts: WPF desktop client (MVVM + Material Design) and Google API integration layer. Used by teachers, student organizations, and office teams. Built with C#, MimeKit, EPPlus, with auto-updater support.
- [Athena Intelligent Olympia](https://github.com/Noboroto/Athena-Intelligent-Olympia): Reverse-engineered and feature-extended quiz competition software suite inspired by Vietnam's Olympia TV show. Built by studying the original closed-source Athena software, then recreating and enhancing it with new capabilities. Contains 8+ projects: AIClient (player app), AIServer (host app), AICtrlLib (control library), AIDataManager (question DB), AILib (shared logic), EncodingAthenaData/DecodingAthena (data tools), and ExcelToAthenaDatabase (Excel import). Features client-server multiplayer, AI opponent, and question database management. Used by Vietnamese schools and clubs running knowledge contests. Built with C#, WPF.
- [font-image-generator](https://github.com/Noboroto/font-image-generator): Web app that generates 3D rendered font preview images. Helps designers and developers evaluate typefaces before committing to a design. Works by rendering uploaded font files as stylized 3D text using React Three Fiber with configurable materials, lighting, and camera angles, then exporting as images. Contains React frontend with Three.js 3D scene and opentype.js font parser. Used by graphic designers and font enthusiasts. Built with JavaScript, React, Three.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS.
- [CaroGame](https://github.com/Noboroto/CaroGame): Console-based Caro (Gomoku) game for Windows with colorful terminal rendering, sound effects, save/load functionality, and player account tracking. A fun university project letting two players compete in the popular Vietnamese strategy game. Built with C++.
- [Dich Vu Cong Support](https://github.com/Noboroto/dichvucong-support): AI-powered Vietnamese public services assistant that helps citizens navigate government service procedures with natural language Q&A. Needed because Vietnamese public service procedures are complex and documentation is scattered. Features GPT-4.1-mini chat, Whisper speech-to-text, and OpenAI TTS for accessibility. Contains 2 parts: React + MUI frontend with CopilotKit AI chat, and Express.js backend with Redis sessions and PostgreSQL via Prisma. Used by Vietnamese citizens needing guidance on government services. Monorepo managed with pnpm workspaces.
- [Bitmap-Cutting-Cpp](https://github.com/Noboroto/Bitmap-Cutting-Cpp): CLI tool that reads BMP files, parses bitmap headers/DIB/pixel data, and splits images into a grid of sub-images by specified row and column partitions. Useful for developers needing programmatic image region extraction without heavy library dependencies. Built in C++ with low-level binary file I/O.

## Languages

Assembly, C, C#, C++, CSS, HTML, JavaScript, Pascal, PowerShell, Prolog, Python, TeX, TypeScript
